searchText.title: Query
searchText.description: Enter your search query to find relevant knowledge assets

SInames.title: Search Indexes
SInames.description: Comma-separated list of search index names to query (optional)

KnowledgeIds.title: Knowledge IDs
KnowledgeIds.description: Comma-separated string of Knowledge IDs for knowledge space search

FilePaths.title: File Paths
FilePaths.description: Comma-separated string of specific file paths that provides the details of the files for knowledge space search

KnowledgeSpaceSearchIndexId.title: Knowledge Space Search Index Id
KnowledgeSpaceSearchIndexId.description: Search index name where the files for knowledge space is indexed

citationsEnabled.title: Citations Enabled
citationsEnabled.description: Whether to include citations in the response
